creator: svysh@pn.sinp.msu.ru
text:
Hi,

Please consider double count of PRs about devel/p5-Workflow

Today jadawin commited PR ports/131070 with errors, reported below
(I mistakenly assigned this error to the PR ports/131048, taken by
beech, which seems double count of the same PR).

Please fix reported error in Makefile of the devel/p5-Workflow port.

All the best, Sergei

>> commit error for PR  ports/131048: maintainer-update of devel/p5-Workflow:

>> During commit of Makefile a line was lost from the BUIL-DEPENDS section, which was present in submitted patch (The line about p5-File-Slurp):
>>
>> -        ${SITE_PERL}/Test/Exception.pm:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Test-Exception
>> +        ${SITE_PERL}/Test/Exception.pm:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Test-Exception \
>> +        ${SITE_PERL}/File/Slurp.pm:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-File-Slurp
> 
> 
> Hello!
> 
> ports/131048 is not committed yet.
> It seems you had to pr for devel/p5-Workflow. I took one in miwi's pr
> and beech took another one.
> Please, wait beech commit this other pr.
